question: What does the Precautionary Principle mean in environmental protection ?

options.1: We should act to protect the environment only after full scientific proof of damage
options.2: We should take preventive action to protect the environment even if we are not completely sure of the harm
options.3: Industries can pollute if it helps the economy grow
options.4: Environmental protection is needed only when people complain

question: The Sustainable Development Goals (SDGs) set by the UN wants to

options.2: Get rid of poverty, take care of the environment and make sure everyone has peace and plenty
options.3: Boost industry growth without caring about the environment

question: The Paris Climate Agreement (2015) mainly aims to

options.2: Limit global temperature rise to well below 2°C above pre-industrial levels
options.4: Increase fossil fuel production for energy security
